catalyst.event: 2026 H1 results disclosure — first primary disclosure that quantifies whether Q1 2026 store-expansion restart is preserving (or eroding) the +35% NI YoY margin gain; resolves both bull and bear core link
catalyst.date_or_window: 2026-08-15 to 2026-08-31 [external estimate, not in our data context]
catalyst.source: Historical H1 reporting window for A-share retailers; exact date not in our data context

rightIf_conditions: Re-engage LONG if: store count YoY ≥ 8% AND operating margin ≥ 10.5% AND SSSG ≥ 0% @ 2026 H1 报告 (≈2026-08-28) | source: 2026 H1 报告 经营数据章节 (store count, SSSG) + 合并利润表 (营业利润/营业收入) | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
Re-engage SHORT if: store count YoY ≥ 8% AND operating margin < 9.5% @ 2026 H1 报告 (≈2026-08-28) | source: 2026 H1 报告 经营数据章节 + 合并利润表 营业利润/营业收入 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
Re-engage SHORT if: revenue YoY < 2% AND operating margin < 10% @ 2026 H1 报告 (≈2026-08-28) | source: 2026 H1 合并利润表 营业收入 + (营业利润/营业收入) | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
wrongIf_conditions: PASS thesis invalidated (forces re-engage either direction) if 2026 H1 report discloses all three of: store count YoY delta, SSSG, and segment-level new-store margins @ 2026 H1 报告 (≈2026-08-28) | source: 2026 H1 报告 经营数据章节 + 分部数据 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE

PASS thesis invalidated if pre-print primary disclosure (e.g. monthly operating bulletin or interim store-count filing) prints store count YoY ≥ 10% before 2026-07-31 @ interim 公告 | source: 临时公告 经营数据 | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE

PASS thesis invalidated if 融资余额 falls below 1.8亿 with price < 17.0 before 2026-07-31 (forced-unwind shorting opportunity) @ Tushare margin daily | source: Tushare margin_detail 融资余额 + daily close | if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE
what_changes_our_mind: 2026 H1 report (≈2026-08-28) discloses ALL of: (i) store count YoY ≥ +8% AND (ii) operating margin ≥ 10.5% AND (iii) SSSG ≥ 0% → moves to LONG. If store count YoY ≥ +8% BUT operating margin < 9.5% → moves to SHORT. Any partial outcome resolves the [E3]→[E1] tier gap and is the trigger to re-engage.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes Dashenlin's broker-narrated two-phase turnaround (efficiency done, expansion restarted) is investable now → We believe both the bull margin-accretive-expansion link AND the bear margin-dilutive-expansion link are unmeasured in our data ([E3]/[E2] only, no [E1] structural base) → Mechanism resolves only on 2026 H1 primary disclosure of store count, SSSG, and segment margin, and pre-print neither direction offers ≥2:1 asymmetry given crowded consensus and leveraged-long positioning.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: Avoided drawdown of -10% to -15% if H1 disappoints into leveraged-long unwind; opportunity cost of +8% to +15% if H1 confirms
expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: Opportunity cost only — no capital at risk
expected_pnl_asymmetry.reward_to_risk: PASS (capital preservation; re-engage post-print with [E1] data)

quantification.metric_target: 2026 H1 operating margin AND store count YoY (joint disclosure)
quantification.current_value: Op Margin TTM 10.5% (live); store count YoY not in our data

core_causal_link.link_sentence: Resumed Q1 2026 store expansion will be margin-accretive (bull) or margin-dilutive (bear) — but this is asserted by brokers and inferred from aggregate divergence, NOT measured at store level in our data.
core_causal_link.tier_justification: Bull's claim rests on broker text (中泰 2026-05-03, 中金 2026-04-28) — [E3]. Bear's claim is inferred from revenue 0.2% vs NI +35% divergence — [E2]. To become [E1], our data context would need: (i) store count YoY series, (ii) SSSG disclosure, (iii) new-store maturity P&L, or (iv) segment-level same-store vs new-store gross margin split. fina_mainbz 20251231 only shows product-mix GMs, not store-cohort economics.

pass_reason_detail: No [E1:direct] structural base exists in our data for the bull's load-bearing claim that 'restarted store expansion will be margin-accretive': (i) store count YoY delta not in data, (ii) same-store-sales growth not in data, (iii) new-store maturity curve / store-level unit economics not in data, (iv) Q1 2026 expansion restart is asserted only by broker text (中泰 2026-05-03), not by primary operating disclosure. The deciding observable — 2026 H1 report on 2026-08-28 (est.) showing simultaneous store_count YoY ≥ 8% AND operating margin ≥ 10.5% AND SSSG ≥ 0% — has not printed. Bear's symmetric inference (expansion will dilute margin) is equally [E2:proxy]. Sell-side is uniformly bullish (38/38 positive, latest target 250000 / EPS 1.5 by 国信), so the consensus crowding ([E4]) means even a confirming H1 print may be largely priced. Pre-print, neither LONG nor SHORT carries ≥2:1 asymmetry.
